top.title: Trump's confidence is undimmed - but every Iran option comes with risk
top.summary: The odds of a quick resolution to the war appear to be dwindling by the day, and the political stakes for the president are only growing.

top.title: Dozens killed after Afghanistan rehab centre struck
top.summary: The BBC visited the facility and saw more than 30 bodies being carried out on stretchers.

top.title: Utah bereavement author found guilty of fatally poisoning her husband
top.summary: A jury found that Kouri Richins killed her husband in March 2022 by poisoning him with a fentanyl-laced drink.

top.title: AI firm Anthropic seeks weapons expert to stop users from 'misuse'
top.summary: The artificial intelligence firm says it wants to prevent "catastrophic misuse" of its systems.

top.title: Firms urged to check if other users edited their data on Companies House
top.summary: The glitch meant logged-in users could view and edit other companies' details without their consent.

top.title: Is this product 'human-made'? The race to establish an AI-free logo
top.summary: The backlash to the growing use of the tech has led to an explosion in attempts to come up with 'AI-Free' logo that could be used globally.
